-- JALANKAN SCRIPT INI DI SQL EDITOR SUPABASE UNTUK UPDATE DATABASE

-- 1. Buat Tabel Organizations (Organisasi Naungan)
create table if not exists public.organizations (
  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
  name text not null,
  description text
);

-- 2. Aktifkan RLS untuk Organizations
alter table public.organizations enable row level security;
drop policy if exists "Enable all access for organizations" on public.organizations;
create policy "Enable all access for organizations" on public.organizations for all using (true) with check (true);

-- 3. Update Tabel Members (Tambah kolom organization_id)
-- Gunakan 'do' block untuk mengecek kolom agar tidak error jika dijalankan ulang
do $$
begin
  if not exists (select 1 from information_schema.columns where table_name = 'members' and column_name = 'organization_id') then
    alter table public.members add column organization_id uuid references public.organizations(id) on delete set null;
  end if;
end $$;

-- 4. Update Tabel Programs (Tambah kolom year dan organization_id)
do $$
begin
  if not exists (select 1 from information_schema.columns where table_name = 'programs' and column_name = 'year') then
    alter table public.programs add column year integer default 2024;
  end if;

  if not exists (select 1 from information_schema.columns where table_name = 'programs' and column_name = 'organization_id') then
    alter table public.programs add column organization_id uuid references public.organizations(id) on delete set null;
  end if;
end $$;

-- 5. Insert Data Awal Organisasi (Contoh)
insert into organizations (name, description)
select 'SD IT Yayasan', 'Sekolah Dasar Islam Terpadu'
where not exists (select 1 from organizations where name = 'SD IT Yayasan');

insert into organizations (name, description)
select 'Yayasan Pusat', 'Pengurus Inti Yayasan'
where not exists (select 1 from organizations where name = 'Yayasan Pusat');

-- ==========================================
-- SEEDER ANGGOTA & BIDANG
-- ==========================================
DO $$
DECLARE
    v_org_id uuid;
    v_role_id uuid;
    v_div_id uuid;
    r record;
BEGIN
    -- 1. Set Organisasi Default (Yayasan Pusat)
    SELECT id INTO v_org_id FROM organizations WHERE name = 'Yayasan Pusat' LIMIT 1;
    -- Fallback jika belum ada
    IF v_org_id IS NULL THEN
        INSERT INTO organizations (name) VALUES ('Yayasan Pusat') RETURNING id INTO v_org_id;
    END IF;

    -- 2. Set Role Default (Anggota)
    SELECT id INTO v_role_id FROM roles WHERE name = 'Anggota' LIMIT 1;
    IF v_role_id IS NULL THEN
         INSERT INTO roles (name) VALUES ('Anggota') RETURNING id INTO v_role_id;
    END IF;

    -- 3. Loop Data Anggota
    -- Format: (Nama Bidang, Nama Anggota)
    FOR r IN SELECT * FROM (VALUES
        -- HARIAN
        ('HARIAN', 'AWIT KURNIAWAN'),
        ('HARIAN', 'H. HARI DANAH W.'),
        ('HARIAN', 'H. ARI SRI M.'),
        ('HARIAN', 'ISMAIL MARJUKI'),
        ('HARIAN', 'EKO ANDRI W.'),
        ('HARIAN', 'ALENOVAN W. P.'),
        ('HARIAN', 'HARIANTO'),
        ('HARIAN', 'RISKA RAHMAWATI'),
        ('HARIAN', 'H. ANDI NUROHMAN'),
        ('HARIAN', 'H. ARIEF WIBOWO'),
        ('HARIAN', 'H. IDA YUSIANINGSIH'),
        
        -- PENDIDIKAN & KURIKULUM
        ('PENDIDIKAN & KURIKULUM', 'SRI KARMINI'),
        ('PENDIDIKAN & KURIKULUM', 'H. AHMAD HIDAYAT'),
        ('PENDIDIKAN & KURIKULUM', 'GRENADA TRI K.'),

        -- KESISWAAN & TENDIK
        ('KESISWAAN & TENDIK', 'ROICHANAH INSAFI'),
        ('KESISWAAN & TENDIK', 'H. DANI MUSTOFA'),
        ('KESISWAAN & TENDIK', 'YOLLA SETYO A.'),

        -- SARPRAS & PERLENGKAPAN
        ('SARPRAS & PERLENGKAPAN', 'FARIZ ALKHAN F.'),
        ('SARPRAS & PERLENGKAPAN', 'AHMAD RISKY F.'),
        ('SARPRAS & PERLENGKAPAN', 'ABDUL KHAFID'),

        -- BK
        ('BK', 'H. SA''I'), -- Escape single quote
        ('BK', 'INESTHA LUNA R. S.'),

        -- KEAMANAN
        ('KEAMANAN', 'IRFAN FAQIH A.'),

        -- HUMAS
        ('HUMAS', 'TORIQ PRIA D.'),
        ('HUMAS', 'SONI ZAED A. R.'),
        ('HUMAS', 'LUHUR SUSENO'),
        ('HUMAS', 'FERRY FERDIANSYAH'),
        ('HUMAS', 'ROYKHAN MALVIN B.'),

        -- PEMBANGUNAN & PENGEMBANGAN
        ('PEMBANGUNAN & PENGEMBANGAN', 'WINDU ABDILLAH'),
        ('PEMBANGUNAN & PENGEMBANGAN', 'H. ISKANDAR'),
        ('PEMBANGUNAN & PENGEMBANGAN', 'FARIZ ALKHAN'), -- Note: Duplicate name in list, handled as unique entry
        ('PEMBANGUNAN & PENGEMBANGAN', 'RIYADIN'),
        ('PEMBANGUNAN & PENGEMBANGAN', 'H. ANDI NURROHMAN'),

        -- KONSUMSI
        ('KONSUMSI', 'H. KHOIRUL HADI B.'),

        -- KESEHATAN
        ('KESEHATAN', 'SUNARNI'),
        ('KESEHATAN', 'ELISA D. K.'),

        -- SDIT
        ('SDIT', 'AUVA DINA NAJA R.'),
        ('SDIT', 'FISCANIA DWI S.'),
        ('SDIT', 'UFIK ISMAWATI')

    ) AS t(div_name, member_name)
    LOOP
        -- A. Cek/Buat Divisi
        SELECT id INTO v_div_id FROM divisions WHERE name = r.div_name LIMIT 1;
        
        IF v_div_id IS NULL THEN
            INSERT INTO divisions (name) VALUES (r.div_name) RETURNING id INTO v_div_id;
        END IF;

        -- B. Masukkan Anggota (Cek duplikasi nama)
        IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM members WHERE full_name = r.member_name) THEN
            INSERT INTO members (full_name, email, role_id, division_id, organization_id)
            VALUES (
                r.member_name, 
                -- Generate Email Dummy: nama.tanpa.spasi@yayasan.seeder
                LOWER(REGEXP_REPLACE(r.member_name, '[^a-zA-Z0-9]', '.', 'g')) || '@yayasan.seeder', 
                v_role_id, 
                v_div_id, 
                v_org_id
            );
        END IF;
    END LOOP;
END $$;

-- JALANKAN SCRIPT INI DI SQL EDITOR SUPABASE UNTUK UPDATE DATABASE

-- 1. Buat Tabel Organizations (Organisasi Naungan)
create table if not exists public.organizations (
  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
  name text not null,
  description text
);

-- 2. Aktifkan RLS untuk Organizations
alter table public.organizations enable row level security;
drop policy if exists "Enable all access for organizations" on public.organizations;
create policy "Enable all access for organizations" on public.organizations for all using (true) with check (true);

-- 3. Update Tabel Members (Tambah kolom organization_id)
-- Gunakan 'do' block untuk mengecek kolom agar tidak error jika dijalankan ulang
do $$
begin
  if not exists (select 1 from information_schema.columns where table_name = 'members' and column_name = 'organization_id') then
    alter table public.members add column organization_id uuid references public.organizations(id) on delete set null;
  end if;
end $$;

-- 4. Update Tabel Programs (Tambah kolom year, organization_id, dan description)
do $$
begin
  if not exists (select 1 from information_schema.columns where table_name = 'programs' and column_name = 'year') then
    alter table public.programs add column year integer default 2024;
  end if;

  if not exists (select 1 from information_schema.columns where table_name = 'programs' and column_name = 'organization_id') then
    alter table public.programs add column organization_id uuid references public.organizations(id) on delete set null;
  end if;

  if not exists (select 1 from information_schema.columns where table_name = 'programs' and column_name = 'description') then
    alter table public.programs add column description text;

end $$;

**Developing Educator Filtering**

I've decided to add an "Educators" page to the system, which focuses on members with "Guru" or "Kepala Sekolah" roles, grouped by organization. I'm confirming that these roles exist in the system and working on filtering logic that lets users view members in the system by these roles per organization. The `Member` struct is fine for the needs. I'm now also looking into Role-Based Access Control and working on how to implement permissions.


**Integrating Role-Based Access**

I'm now fully immersed in implementing Role-Based Access Control (RBAC). The plan's in place: I've started by adding a `permissions` column to the `roles` table. Next, I'll update `App.tsx` to dynamically fetch user role and permissions to use for filtering navigation items and securing routes. This is a critical step for data protection. I'm focusing on adapting the current UI in `Roles.tsx` to handle permission editing using checkboxes. I'm on track to improve user data management.


**Implementing Access Controls**

I'm now implementing the access control system. I've stored `userPermissions` in the state and modified `NavItem` to check for view IDs. Now, if a user tries to view something they don't have permission for, they'll be redirected or see an "Access Denied" message. I've also created the `Educators` page as a new component, which will manage the "Guru" and "Kepala Sekolah" data. I've added `EDUCATORS` to `ViewState` and added the route and icon in the code. I'm now fine-tuning the design of the RBAC interface in `Roles.tsx` using checkboxes to define permissions, and I'm designing the interface of the `Educators` page.


**Defining Code Structures**

I'm now refining the core data structures needed to support the access control system. I'm adding `permissions` to the `Role` type in `types.ts` and incorporating the `EDUCATORS` view state. I'm also preparing for the visual enhancements by adding new icons like `GraduationCap`, `Lock`, and `Unlock` in `Icons.tsx`. I'm starting work on `Roles.tsx` and creating the `Educators.tsx` component. I'm prioritizing user data security. I'm using an array of strings to store permissions in Supabase.


**Defining Educators View**

I'm now focusing on how the "Educators" view will display and organize the data. I'm choosing to simply filter members by their existing roles and organization.  I'm making sure to define an interface that accurately displays the "Kepala Sekolah" and the list of "Guru" members. I will integrate this filtering into the `Educators` page. I've reevaluated the implementation to simplify it.


**Implementing Permission Constants**

I'm now writing the code to define the permission constants. I've realized the existing setup wasn't ideal, so I'm creating a `PERMISSIONS` array that mirrors the `ViewState` values. I'm focusing on ensuring consistent definitions for access control.

3.  **Menu Baru: Tenaga Pendidik (`pages/Educators.tsx`):**
    *   Halaman khusus untuk melihat data Guru dan Kepala Sekolah per Organisasi.
    *   Menampilkan kartu Organisasi dengan informasi siapa Kepala Sekolahnya dan berapa jumlah gurunya.
    *   Detail tabel untuk melihat daftar guru di organisasi tersebut.

4.  **Sistem Keamanan & Navigasi (`App.tsx`):**
    *   **Logic Auth:** Saat aplikasi dimuat, sistem akan mengecek role user yang sedang login.
    *   **Dynamic Navigation:** Sidebar hanya akan menampilkan menu yang diizinkan oleh permission role user tersebut.

Berikut adalah spesifikasi perubahan dan kode untuk mengubah **E-Yayasan CMS** menjadi **E-Rapi**.

### Spesifikasi Perubahan

1.  **Rebranding & Multi-Tenancy (E-Rapi):**
    *   Mengubah nama aplikasi menjadi **E-Rapi**.
    *   Membuat tabel baru `foundations` (Yayasan) untuk mendukung *multiple yayasan*.
    *   Fitur konfigurasi per Yayasan: Super Admin dapat menentukan fitur apa saja (modul) yang aktif untuk yayasan tertentu (misal: hanya Absensi, atau Full Modul).

2.  **Organisasi & Tipe Pendidikan:**
    *   Menambahkan kolom `type` pada tabel `organizations`. Opsinya: `Education` (Pendidikan) dan `General` (Umum/Non-Pendidikan).
    *   Pada halaman **Manajemen Organisasi**, user harus memilih tipe organisasi saat membuat/edit.
    *   Tombol **"Kelola Pendidik"** di halaman Organisasi *hanya* muncul jika tipe organisasi adalah **Pendidikan**.

3.  **Logika Menu & Akses:**
    *   Menu Sidebar akan dinamis berdasarkan **Fitur** yang diaktifkan oleh Super Admin untuk yayasan tersebut.
    *   Halaman **Tenaga Pendidik** hanya akan menampilkan data dari organisasi bertipe Pendidikan.
    *   Menambahkan halaman baru **Master Yayasan** (hanya untuk Super Admin) untuk CRUD Yayasan dan setting fitur.
